raw_consumer_statement: My credit card was charged through my XXXX account when it was hacked. I reported the fraud to XXXX and they said they would remove it. When they didn't I disputed it with my Credit Card company Citi Bank. Last week they closed the investigation saying I owe the charges. I spoke with Supervisor XXXX in the Fraud department and after asking me if I had every used XXXX in my life and I said yes she said then its not fraud. She refused to hear the details of my card being hacked. I have spoken with their department multiple times and they are just giving me the run around. The Fraud happened on XX/XX/year> and the Dispute began on XXXX. Today Citi charged me {$1300.00} and {$330.00} in my account
